text.title: Pattern Decision Record Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the multi-agent pattern decision record (ADR-shaped).

example.code: task: "Generate, critique, and finalize a 1500-word EU AI Act explainer for an engineering blog" pattern: generator_critic rationale: "Quality-critical text; a single generator misses factual drift. Generator + opus critic loop catches errors a sequential editor misses." alternatives_considered: - {pattern: sequential, why_rejected: "research→write→edit chain does not surface factual drift if editor and researcher agree"} - {pattern: hierarchical, why_rejected: "No clear subtask split; one writer, one critic — no manager needed"} tradeoffs: latency: "+50% vs sequential (extra critic round)" cost: "+30% (critic uses opus)" audit: "Best — every claim has a generator + critic decision trail" parallelism: "None — pattern is inherently sequential loop" downstream_methodology: "geek/ai/ai-agents/multi-agent-conversational" hitl_gates: ["before publish-to-blog action"]
task: "x" pattern: "hierarchical + loop + hitl" rationale: "stacks of patterns"
example.note: Pattern is a stack (rule r1), task too short, missing alternatives_considered, tradeoffs, downstream_methodology, hitl_gates.

list.item: Pattern is one of the 8 canonical names exactly.
Rationale ≥32 chars and references the dominant trade-off axis.
`downstream_methodology` path resolves to a real impl methodology.
